heading: Step 1: Set up the Python project.
body:
```shell
# Create a new directory for the project
mkdir atlas-search-project && cd atlas-search-project

# Install PyMongo
pip install pymongo
```

For detailed installation instructions, see
[MongoDB Python Driver documentation](languages/python/pymongo-driver/get-started).
